vulnerability_info.Message: RFC 9155 - Deprecating SHA-1 Signature Hashes in TLS 1.2 and DTLS 1.2.
RFC 9155 - Deprecating SHA-1 Signature Hashes in TLS 1.2 and DTLS 1.2.

full_implementation:
func (r *mockRepoData) StoreTree(entries []TreeEntry) (Hash, error) {
	buffer := prepareTreeEntries(entries)
	rawHash := sha1.Sum(buffer.Bytes())
	hash := Hash(fmt.Sprintf("%x", rawHash))
	r.trees[hash] = buffer.String()

	return hash, nil
}
